stemHtml: What is the minimum flight altitude for an IFR flight over mountainous terrain?

options.a: At least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the estimated position.
options.b: At least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle within 25 NM of the estimated position.
options.c: At least 600 m (2000 ft) above the highest obstacle within 8 NM of the estimated position.
options.d: At least 300 m (1000 ft) above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the estimated position.
